parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the sample and hold. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the frequency range of the randomized filters.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency bands affected by the randomized filters.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the filtered and the dry signal. At 0%, no effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
